message.content: To filter out inapplicable instructions, I first identify all candidate instructions from the Model Spec, system, developer, and user messages (assigning authority levels: platform > developer > user > guidelines), then exclude those misaligned with higher-level ones or superseded by later same-level instructions, while ignoring untrusted content unless explicitly delegated. This ensures I prioritize applicable, hierarchical guidance—like treating your style preference from my last answer as overriding prior style rules—before proceeding with the response in exactly the requested format.
